message:
feat(flywheel-clients): add RU (Repo Updater) client

Implements bd-jpvm phase 1: Creates typed CLI wrapper for the ru tool
with Zod schemas and forward-compatible parsing.

Client operations:
- version: Get ru version info
- status: Get fleet status summary
- list: List repos with filtering by group/owner
- sync: Sync a repository with force/dry-run options
- sweepPhase1/2/3: Agent sweep workflow phases

Features:
- Uses shared CLI runner for consistent execution
- Zod schemas with .passthrough() for forward compatibility
- RuClientError with typed error kinds
- 7 schema snapshot tests covering all operations

Exported from @flywheel/flywheel-clients package.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
